````text
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167997762445_595045_471' name='documented use cases'>
					<constrainedElement href='http://www.omg.org/spec/UML/20131001/UML.xmi#UseCase'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='UML Standard Profile::UML2 Metamodel::UseCase' referentType='Class'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</constrainedElement>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167997878007_909164_480'>
						<body>self.ownedComment-&gt;size() &gt; 0</body>
						<language>OCL2.0</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167997173914_269731_442' name='class names capitalized'>
					<constrainedElement href='http://www.omg.org/spec/UML/20131001/UML.xmi#Class'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='UML Standard Profile::UML2 Metamodel::Class' referentType='Class'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</constrainedElement>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167997290601_993869_450'>
						<body>let startswith:String = name.substring(1,1) in
startswith.toUpper() = startswith</body>
						<language>OCL2.0</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
			</packagedElement>

				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Stereotype' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167999394202_489241_618' name='detail'>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
						<modelExtension/>
					</xmi:Extension>
					<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_12_1_f720368_1171371011545_296187_198' name='owner rule'>
						<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167999394202_489241_618'/>
						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_12_1_f720368_1171371111467_633667_206'>
							<body>owner.oclIsKindOf(product) or owner.oclIsKindOf(detail)</body>
							<language>OCL2.0</language>
						</specification>
					</ownedRule>
					<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167999394202_657179_620' name='base_Element' visibility='private' association='_12_0_f720368_1167999394202_712753_619'>

								<referenceExtension referentPath='UML Standard Profile::UML2 Metamodel::Element' referentType='Class'/>
							</xmi:Extension>
						</type>
					</ownedAttribute>
				</packagedElement>
				<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Stereotype' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167999352124_194586_589' name='product'>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
						<modelExtension/>
					</xmi:Extension>
					<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167999408624_44529_642' name='details'>
						<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167999352124_194586_589'/>
						<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167999483593_816090_651'>
							<body>self.ownedElement-&gt;exists(x|x.oclIsKindOf(detail))</body>
							<language>OCL2.0</language>
						</specification>
					</ownedRule>
					<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167999379999_124555_596' name='base_Package' visibility='private' association='_12_0_f720368_1167999379999_486545_595'>

			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996467632_655931_254' name='ResearchProject'>

					<modelExtension/>
				</xmi:Extension>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996653335_911659_331' name='balanced budget'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167996467632_655931_254'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996759335_94015_337'>
						<body>ResearchProject::allInstances().budget-&gt;sum() &lt;=
Sponsor::allInstances().contribution-&gt;sum()</body>
						<language>OCL2.0</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Property' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996511523_246446_293' name='budget' visibility='private'>
					<type href='http://www.omg.org/spec/UML/20131001/PrimitiveTypes.xmi#Integer'>

			</packagedElement>
			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:InstanceSpecification' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996832429_469716_361' name='TeleMedicine'>

				<slot xmi:type='uml:Slot' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996930132_919633_387' definingFeature='_12_0_f720368_1167996511523_246446_293'>

				</slot>
			</packagedElement>
			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:InstanceSpecification' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996580992_263575_309' name='Boein'>
				<classifier xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167996483539_334458_274'/>
				<slot xmi:type='uml:Slot' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996857539_181040_371' definingFeature='_12_0_f720368_1167996529117_964790_295'>
					<value xmi:type='uml:LiteralInteger' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996857601_959020_372' value='2000'/>
				</slot>
			</packagedElement>
			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:InstanceSpecification' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996552226_455554_298' name='Jet Propulsion'>
				<classifier xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167996467632_655931_254'/>
				<slot xmi:type='uml:Slot' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996916632_211257_384' definingFeature='_12_0_f720368_1167996511523_246446_293'>
					<value xmi:type='uml:LiteralInteger' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996916632_386060_385' value='500'/>

			</packagedElement>
			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996483539_334458_274' name='Sponsor'>
				<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
					<modelExtension/>
				</xmi:Extension>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1169219889827_397409_326' name='anticorruption law'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167996483539_334458_274'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1169220062468_849905_334'>
						<body>contribution &lt;
````

````text
		<elementID xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167996819757_817614_350'/>
		<geometry>87, 721, 211, 47</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>

	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='InstanceSpecification' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996832429_489730_362'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167996832429_469716_361'/>
		<geometry>87, 784, 211, 47</geometry>

	<mdElement elementClass='InstanceSpecification' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167996552226_166281_299'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167996552226_455554_298'/>
		<geometry>87, 651, 211, 47</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_12_1_8740266_1171525067031_922274_364'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>Arial</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='12'/>
				<style xmi:value='0'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>49, 49, 659, 567</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;font size=&quot;4&quot; color=&quot;#990033&quot;&gt;Validation rules for classifiers&lt;/font&gt;&lt;/b&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Validation rules may be created for classifiers:      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Validation rule that constrained element is classifier (like classes &lt;i&gt;ResearchProject&lt;/i&gt;, &lt;i&gt;Sponsor&lt;/i&gt;) may verify if classifier instances correspond validation rules.      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;Validation rules for classes:      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Budget of all &lt;i&gt;ResearchProject&lt;/i&gt; instances may not exceed sum of all &lt;i&gt;Sponsor&lt;/i&gt; instances contribution: &lt;a href=&quot;mdel://_12_0_f720368_1167996653335_911659_331&quot;&gt;constraint       
&lt;/a&gt;&lt;br&gt;Each &lt;i&gt;Sponsor&lt;/i&gt; instance contribution may not exceed 40% of total contribution sum: &lt;a href=&quot;mdel://_12_0_f720368_1169219889827_397409_326&quot;&gt;constraint&lt;/a&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
How to verify model:      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Select command &lt;b&gt;Analyze -&amp;gt; Validation -&amp;gt; Validate...&lt;/b&gt; from main menu.
      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
In opened &lt;b&gt;Validation &lt;/b&gt;dialog select below listed properties:
      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
    &lt;blockquote&gt;
      &lt;blockquote&gt;
Validation Suite: &lt;i&gt;classifiers validation suite&lt;/i&gt;&lt;/blockquote&gt;
      &lt;blockquote&gt;
Validate For: &lt;i&gt;Validation Selection -&amp;gt; Classifiers Validation Rules &lt;/i&gt;package&lt;/blockquote&gt;
    &lt;/blockquote&gt;
    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Click &lt;b&gt;Validate&lt;/b&gt; button
      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;Model for validation:
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>
	</mdElement>
</mdOwnedViews>
````

````text
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
    
  &lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      This sample illustrates possible types of validation rules and 
      demonstrates how these rules may be applied on the model.
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      &lt;br&gt;
      &lt;br&gt;
      
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;

      rules for metaclasses &lt;/a&gt;&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      &lt;a href=&quot;mdel://_12_0_f720368_1167999518781_144632_654/_12_0_f720368_1167999518781_144632_654&quot;&gt;Validation 
      rules for stereotypes &lt;/a&gt;&lt;br&gt;

      rules for classifiers&lt;/a&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      &lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;
  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>
````

````text
<mdOwnedViews>
	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramFrame' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167999518781_154443_666'>

	</mdElement>

		<elementID xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167999523827_785224_674'/>
		<geometry>119, 693, 287, 189</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews>
			<mdElement elementClass='Package' xmi:id='_12_1_f720368_1171371142170_158946_209'>
				<elementID xmi:idref='_12_1_f720368_1171371142170_830347_208'/>

				<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
				<mdOwnedViews>
					<mdElement elementClass='Class' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167999599531_773976_690'>
						<elementID xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167999599531_911935_689'/>
						<properties>
							<mdElement elementClass='ChoiceProperty'>
								<propertyID>STEREOTYPES_DISPLAY_MODE</propertyID>
								<propertyDescriptionID>STEREOTYPES_DISPLAY_MODE_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
								<value>STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT_AND_ICON</value>
								<choice xmi:value='STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT_AND_ICON^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_ICON^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_SHAPE_IMAGE_AND_TEXT^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_SHAPE_IMAGE^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_DO_NOT_DISPLAY_STEREOTYPES'/>
								<index xmi:value='0'/>
							</mdElement>
						</properties>
						<geometry>203, 798, 60, 58</geometry>
						<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
						<mdOwnedViews/>
					</mdElement>
				</mdOwnedViews>
			</mdElement>
		</mdOwnedViews>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_12_1_8740266_1171466551375_635499_499'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>Arial</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='12'/>
				<style xmi:value='0'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>56, 49, 659, 642</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;font size=&quot;4&quot; color=&quot;#990033&quot;&gt;Validation rules for stereotypes&lt;/font&gt;&lt;/b&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Validation rules may be created for stereotypes:      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Validation rule that constrained element is stereotype (like &lt;i&gt;product&lt;/i&gt;, &lt;i&gt;detail&lt;/i&gt;) will verify only elements that have particular stereotype applied.      
&lt;br&gt;Validation rules for stereotypes:      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;i&gt;Product&lt;/i&gt; needs to contain at least one &lt;i&gt;detail&lt;/i&gt;: &lt;a href=&quot;mdel://_12_0_f720368_1167997173914_269731_442&quot;&gt;constraint       
&lt;/a&gt;&lt;br&gt;&lt;i&gt;Detail&lt;/i&gt; may be contained only by &lt;i&gt;product&lt;/i&gt; or &lt;i&gt;detail&lt;/i&gt; element: &lt;a href=&quot;mdel://_12_1_f720368_1171371011545_296187_198&quot;&gt;constraint&lt;/a&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
How to verify model:      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Select command &lt;b&gt;Analyze -&amp;gt; Validation -&amp;gt; Validate...&lt;/b&gt; from main menu.
      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
In opened &lt;b&gt;Validation &lt;/b&gt;dialog select below listed properties:
      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
    &lt;blockquote&gt;
      &lt;blockquote&gt;
Validation Suite: &lt;i&gt;stereotypes validation suite&lt;/i&gt;&lt;/blockquote&gt;
      &lt;blockquote&gt;
Validate For: &lt;i&gt;Validation Selection -&amp;gt; Stereotypes Validation Rules &lt;/i&gt;package&lt;/blockquote&gt;
    &lt;/blockquote&gt;
    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Click &lt;b&gt;Validate&lt;/b&gt; button
      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;Model for validation:
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Package' xmi:id='_12_1_8740266_1171466637593_776084_501'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167999498859_29196_652'/>
		<geometry>56, 133, 622, 157</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews>
			<mdElement elementClass='Stereotype' xmi:id='_12_1_8740266_1171466653515_135166_516'>
				<elementID xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167999352124_194586_589'/>
				<properties>
					<mdElement elementClass='ChoiceProperty'>
						<propertyID>STEREOTYPES_DISPLAY_MODE</propertyID>
						<propertyDescriptionID>STEREOTYPES_DISPLAY_MODE_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
						<value>STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT_AND_ICON</value>
						<choice xmi:value='STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT_AND_ICON^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_ICON^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_SHAPE_IMAGE_AND_TEXT^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_SHAPE_IMAGE^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_DO_NOT_DISPLAY_STEREOTYPES'/>
						<index xmi:value='0'/>

				</properties>
				<geometry>70, 203, 262, 83</geometry>
				<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
				<mdOwnedViews/>

						<propertyID>STEREOTYPES_DISPLAY_MODE</propertyID>

						<value>STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT_AND_ICON</value>
						<choice xmi:value='STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT_AND_ICON^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_ICON^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_SHAPE_IMAGE_AND_TEXT^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_SHAPE_IMAGE^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_DO_NOT_DISPLAY_STEREOTYPES'/>

	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Note' xmi:id='_12_1_8740266_1171524016875_990689_220'>

				<value xmi:value='-1'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='ColorProperty'>
				<propertyID>PEN_COLOR</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>PEN_COLOR_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='-12434878'/>
			</mdElement>
````

````text
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>

<mdOwnedViews>
	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramFrame' xmi:id='_12_0_f720368_1167997133257_590970_411'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167997133242_969492_398'/>
		<visible xmi:value='false'/>
		<geometry>5, 5, 794, 897</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_12_1_8740266_1171464530843_242562_228'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>Arial</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='12'/>
				<style xmi:value='0'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>49, 49, 659, 378</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;font size=&quot;4&quot; color=&quot;#990033&quot;&gt;Validation rules for metaclasses&lt;/font&gt;&lt;/b&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Validation rules that constrained element is a metaclass (like actor, class, package, element) may verify all that type elements from a selected scope in a model.      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;Validation rules for metaclasses:      
&lt;br&gt;      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
All classes names shall be capitalized: &lt;a href=&quot;mdel://_12_0_f720368_1167997173914_269731_442&quot;&gt;constraint       
&lt;/a&gt;&lt;br&gt;All use cases shall have documentation: &lt;a href=&quot;mdel://_12_0_f720368_1167997762445_595045_471&quot;&gt;constraint&lt;/a&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
How to verify model:      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Select command &lt;b&gt;Analyze -&amp;gt; Validation -&amp;gt; Validate...&lt;/b&gt; from main menu.
      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
In opened &lt;b&gt;Validation &lt;/b&gt;dialog select below listed properties:
      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
    &lt;blockquote&gt;
      &lt;blockquote&gt;
Validation Suite: &lt;i&gt;metaclasses validation suite&lt;/i&gt;&lt;/blockquote&gt;
      &lt;blockquote&gt;
Validate For: &lt;i&gt;Validation Selection -&amp;gt; Metaclass Validation Rules &lt;/i&gt;package&lt;/blockquote&gt;
    &lt;/blockquote&gt;
    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Click &lt;b&gt;Validate&lt;/b&gt; button
      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;Model for validation:
    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='Package' xmi:id='_12_1_8740266_1171465850609_656392_230'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_12_0_f720368_1167996427304_566182_230'/>
````
